Off Calendar May-17-2010 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Apr-22-2010 Continued To May-17-10 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 506

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-11-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Joseph Lepera, Esq., for Appellant/Defendant Zainab (Samina) Ali who is also present.
Ross Madden, Esq., for Respondent/Plaintiff Bassam Salameh is present with witness, Lisa Violetto.

The cause comes on regulary for trial de novo. All parties and witness are sworn. Lisa Vialeto testifies on behalf of Respondent/Plaintiff. Respondent/Plaintiff Bassam Salameh testifies on his own behalf.

The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - 1 page email
Exhibit 2 - 1 page transcript of voicemail left by Samina Ali to Bassam Salameh
Exhibt 3 - 1 page email from Bassam Salameh to Samina Ali

Exhibt A - 1 page First American title Company

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

JUDGE RICHARD B. ULMER JR., Clerk M. Smith, Not Reported (503)
